message:
fix(core): replace truncating cast in approval now_ms() with try_from

The previous implementation used `d.as_millis() as i64` which silently
truncates the u128 return value. Replace with `i64::try_from(...).unwrap_or(i64::MAX)`
matching the pattern already used in `expiry_ms()` and `ingest::epoch_ms()`.
Removes the clippy cast_possible_truncation suppression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
